ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offenders" (
  "noms_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the offender */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* First given name of the offender */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the offender */,
  "establishment_code" TEXT /* Code of the establishment where the offender is held */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the offender */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the offender */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the offender */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the offender */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the offender */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the offender was captured or arrested */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual release date */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the offender's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the establishment */,
  "establishment_name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the establishment */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the establishment */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the establishment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the establishment */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the establishment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitation program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in days */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility to participate in the program */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the program sessions */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor leading the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offender_programs" (
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rehabilitation program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the offender was enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Current completion status of the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the program was completed */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the offender's progress in the program */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the program instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noms_number", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parole_records" (
  "parole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parole record */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender on parole */,
  "parole_date" TEXT /* Date when parole was granted */,
  "parole_officer" TEXT /* Name of the parole officer */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the offender is released on parole */,
  "next_parole_hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next parole hearing */,
  "parole_conditions_met" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parole conditions have been met */,
  "parole_violations" TEXT /* Any violations of parole conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parole_records_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "infractions" (
  "infraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the infraction record */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender who committed the infraction */,
  "infraction_date" TEXT /* Date when the infraction occurred */,
  "infraction_type" TEXT /* Type of infraction committed */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty imposed for the infraction */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* Names of any witnesses */,
  "reporting_officer" TEXT /* Name of the officer who reported the infraction */,
  "infraction_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the infraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infractions_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, officer, case manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health record */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender */,
  "health_issue" TEXT /* Description of the health issue */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided for the health issue */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Medical diagnosis */,
  "physician_name" TEXT /* Name of the physician */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitation_records" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visitation record */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender visited */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visitation */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the visit was approved */,
  "visitor_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the visitor to the offender */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the visitation */,
  "security_check" TEXT /* Details of the security check performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitation_records_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_records" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the court record */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender */,
  "court_date" TEXT /* Date of the court appearance */,
  "court_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the court appearance */,
  "next_hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled hearing */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "defense_attorney" TEXT /* Name of the defense attorney */,
  "prosecutor" TEXT /* Name of the prosecutor */,
  "court_location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_records_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the case manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the case manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the case manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the case manager belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the case manager's office */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the case manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_assignments" (
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case manager assigned to the offender */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the case manager was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the case assignment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noms_number", "manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the safety report */,
  "noms_number" TEXT /* NOMS number of the offender involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the safety incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident reported */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the incident */,
  "reporting_officer" TEXT /* Name of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* Names of any witnesses */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_noms_number FOREIGN KEY ("noms_number") REFERENCES offenders ("noms_number")
)
